  • Uses of Room in pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic

    Methods in pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic that return types with arguments of type Room
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<Room>
    BuildingInfoTransformer.findRoom(Building building, int id)
    Finds a Room anywhere within a building by its id.
    List<Room>
    BuildingInfoTransformer.getRoomsExceedingHeatingThreshold(Building building, double threshold)
    Returns all rooms within a building whose heating energy consumption per m³ exceeds the given threshold.

    Method
    Description
    List<Room>
    HeatingThresholdVisitor.getResult()
    Returns an unmodifiable view of the rooms collected during traversal.
    Methods in pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.visitor with parameters of type Room
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    HeatingThresholdVisitor.visit(Room room)
    Checks whether this room's heating per m³ exceeds the threshold and, if so, adds it to the result list.

    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<Room>>
